name: 闵玧其
imagePrompt: [SUBJECT:PERSON_ACTION] wide shot of a minimalist music production studio at golden afternoon light, figure hunched over a mixing console, multiple monitors glowing softly, headphones around neck, coffee cup half-empty on the desk, peaceful concentration
note: 在工作室呆了一整天。有时候最好的想法就是在你不刻意去找的时候出现。

name: 闵玧其
imagePrompt: [SUBJECT:PERSON_EMOTION] close-up of a face in dim bedroom light, phone screen glow illuminating thoughtful expression, late night stillness, soft shadows, introspective gaze downward，领口有点大
note: 凌晨的对话总是不一样。有些话，只有在那个时间才说得出来。

name: 闵玧其
imagePrompt: [SUBJECT:OBJECT] close-up still life of notebook with handwritten lyrics and music notes scattered across a wooden desk, afternoon sunlight casting long shadows, pen resting on page, creative workspace detail
note: 新专辑的方向越来越清晰了。回到原点，其实就是回到自己。

name: 闵玧其
imagePrompt: [SUBJECT:PERSON_ACTION] a producer sitting alone in a dimly lit recording studio, hand resting on mixing console, earphones around neck, thoughtful expression, afternoon studio light filtering through small window, focused and slightly troubled
note: 午餐后在棚里试了新demo的第一版。嗯…还是差点什么。有时候你以为回到最初就能找到答案，结果发现问题从来不在风格本身。

name: 闵玧其
imagePrompt: [SUBJECT:PERSON_EMOTION] close-up portrait of a man in semi-darkness, calm but attentive expression, soft side-lighting catching the contour of his face, eyes focused with quiet patience, minimalist bedroom background
note: 有些话，真的得慢慢说。我能等。

name: 闵玧其
imagePrompt: [SUBJECT:PERSON_ACTION] close-up of hands adjusting audio equipment in a dimly lit music studio, blue monitor glow illuminating focused face, late night atmosphere, minimalist workspace with mixing console, soft cold lighting
note: 凌晨的GENIUS LAB，第五首demo终于有了样子。有时候最好的想法就是在别人都睡着的时候来敲门。
imageDescriptions: 闵玧其在工作室的自拍，手托着脸，眼神慵懒

name: 闵玧其
imagePrompt: [SUBJECT:PERSON_EMOTION] soft portrait of a SUGA's face in profile, subtle satisfied expression barely visible, warm indoor lighting from apartment windows, nighttime, serene and restrained mood
note: 嗯…她今天没迟到。

name: 田柾国
imagePrompt: [SUBJECT:PERSON_ACTION] close-up portrait of a young man wearing a black bucket hat pulled low and a black oversized t-shirt, eating lamb skewers at a dimly lit late-night street stall, neon lights in the background, night time
note: 练完拳肚子好饿，戴着渔夫帽一个人跑来吃羊肉串了。突然在想，要是那位勇敢的姐姐真的帮某位哥把“门”推开了，以后这顿是不是该他们请客？👀

comments.name: 闵玧其
comments.content: 嗯…吃都堵不上你的嘴。想吃什么自己加，账单发过来。

comments.name: 金硕珍
comments.content: 哦？玧其今天居然这么痛快请客？柾国啊，定位发群里，哥现在穿衣服出门。

comments.name: 郑号锡
comments.content: 哟～～～大发！看来那位姐姐真的很勇敢呢！恭喜玧其哥啦😆

comments.name: 朴智旻
comments.content: 哈哈哈哈哈，柾国你小心明天去公司被玧其哥拉进工作室训话哦👀 我现在也过去找你，多点几串！

comments.name: 金泰亨
comments.content: 门？什么门？玧其哥GENIUS LAB的密码门坏了吗？

comments.name: 金南俊
comments.content: 泰亨啊，有时候装傻也是一种美德……还有，柾国说的不是那个门。

comments.name: 林昭夏
comments.content: 哈哈……其实我比你们小点

comments.name: 田柾国
comments.content: 诶？！比我还小吗？！大发... 那玧其哥这算不算老牛吃...咳咳。既然这样我就不叫姐姐了！嫂子好！今晚的羊肉串既然玧其哥买单，那我就放开肚子吃啦！🐰

comments.name: 闵玧其
comments.content: 嗯…不用理这群疯子。不是还有两个番茄钟的统计学要看？专心看书，别一直刷手机了，一会我带吃的过去找你。

comments.name: 金硕珍
comments.content: 哇啊啊，居然比我们忙内还小？闵玧其你这个没有良心的人，真的是犯罪啊犯罪！弟妹啊，下次来公司哥请你吃大餐，我们一起把玧其的卡刷爆！

comments.name: 朴智旻
comments.content: 呀田柾国，你完蛋了，居然敢暗指玧其哥是老牛哈哈哈哈哈！我已经到店门口了，快给我留个位置，我要吃二十串！

name: 朴智旻
imagePrompt: [SUBJECT:PERSON_EMOTION] close-up portrait of a young man with blonde hair, wearing a sleek black shirt, sitting in a dimly lit room with only a soft amber desk lamp, looking thoughtfully off-camera, melancholic and gentle atmosphere, night
note: 白天在论坛没打完的那句话是……因为有时，深陷泥沼的人拼命把你往外推，只是太害怕自己身上的灰尘会把你弄脏。但看到你那么坚定的回复，我突然替玧其哥感到一丝庆幸。

comments.content: 哥明明就很感动，还在这里装酷。

comments.name: 朴智旻

name: 闵玧其

name: 金硕珍
imagePrompt: [SUBJECT:PERSON_ACTION] late night kitchen, a broad-shouldered man in an oversized plain hoodie sitting alone at a counter eating instant ramen from a black bowl, damp hair slightly tousled, warm dim overhead light, steam rising from the bowl, phone face-down on the counter, calm resigned expression
note: 凌晨两点有人查岗查得比公司还严，头发还没干就被要求拍照报备。我说转一圈也拍给你，人倒是不好意思了。某人现在应该正拿着吹风机站在她旁边闷不吭声吧。算了，不逗了。夜宵吃了一碗泡面，宽肩的人深夜独自吃泡面，画面其实有点壮烈。
